title: dodonaea lanceolata var. subsessilifolia
intro: Dodonaea lanceolata var. subsessilifolia is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the 'blackthorn' or 'black oak'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dodonaea lanceolata var. subsessilifolia include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
